🌱 Gamified Productivity

Finish your tasks.
Grow real gardens.

BloomDay turns every completed task into a living plant. Build habits, stay focused, and watch your garden flourish.

Growing with 3,000+ users

Three steps to a greener day

Simple enough to start today, rewarding enough to keep going.

Add Your Tasks

Plan your day, set goals, and organize your tasks with our simple, intuitive interface.

Complete Them

Check off your tasks and earn seeds for your garden. Stay consistent to build streaks.

Watch It Grow

Your daily productivity feeds real digital gardens, building a thriving garden over time.

Designed to delight

Every detail is made with care, just like a garden.

Focus Mode

Your Garden

Weekly Stats

Beyond the basics

Features that make a difference

Plant Journal

Every plant tells a story

Track your garden's growth with a beautiful journal. See when each plant was earned and which tasks it represents, and watch the journey from seed to bloom.

  • Track growth milestones
  • Detailed plant profiles
  • 101 unique species to collect

Letters to Future You

Reflect on your journey

Write capsule letters to your future self. Set them to arrive in weeks, months, or years. A beautiful way to track your growth beyond just tasks.

  • Schedule delivery dates
  • Add life context and memories
  • Gets more meaningful over time

Everything you need to bloom

Packed with thoughtful features that grow with you.

101 Plant Species

An ever-growing collection of unique plant designs. From succulents to ferns, each with unique growth stages and personalities.

3 Garden Themes

Choose your world: cozy interior, classic English garden, or rustic allotment. Each offers a distinctive backdrop for your plants.

Focus Mode

Lock into immersive 25-90 minute sessions with background sounds. These timed focus blocks help you do deep, interruption-free work.

Streak Tracking

Build consistency with task streak tracking. Watch your day-by-day progress and maintain your momentum.

Time Capsule Letters

Write letters to your future self. Schedule delivery and reflect on your journey with heartfelt notifications from your past self.

Home Screen Widget

See your garden and tasks at a glance. Our widget brings BloomDay right to your home screen for quick access.

Ready to grow your garden?

Join thousands of productive gardeners. Free to start.

Available on iOS. Android coming soon.
